category_title: High school freshman with social anxiety and decoding struggles
minimal_context: Harry is sitting in his English 9E classroom and is asked to follow along with the text in his book while the teacher reads aloud to the class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Harry, please open your book and follow along with the text while I read aloud to the class.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I really dislike reading. English has always been a historic struggle for me.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's just focus on the page. Try to follow the words as I read.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm losing my place. When you read aloud, looking at the words just becomes a distraction and I can't focus.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just keep trying to track the sentences with your eyes.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't do it with everyone here. If I try, it's just going to sound like, 'The du ...du ...duck cr ...crossed the br ...bridge.' I’m afraid to come to the class and get judged.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Harry, please open your book and follow along with the text while I read aloud to the class.

STUDENT: I really dislike reading. English has always been a historic struggle for me.

TUTOR: Let's just focus on the page. Try to follow the words as I read.

STUDENT: I'm losing my place. When you read aloud, looking at the words just becomes a distraction and I can't focus.

TUTOR: Just keep trying to track the sentences with your eyes.

STUDENT: I can't do it with everyone here. If I try, it's just going to sound like, 'The du ...du ...duck cr ...crossed the br ...bridge.' I’m afraid to come to the class and get judged.

task.content: Follow along with the text while someone read aloud

context.environment: English 9E—with modified objectives for readers identified to be reading at the third- to fifth-grade levels
context.social_setting: Classroom with peers present, where he has a contentious social life and troubles with peers

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When he was asked to follow along with the text while someone read aloud
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: The words became a distraction, leading to his inability to focus. He reported losing his place and struggling to follow along with the words. He mimicked his own struggling reading fluency.
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Inability to focus; afraid to come to the class and get judged
related_quotes: I’m afraid to come to the class and get judged.

behavior_patterns.condition: During general class activities involving reading
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Often complained about reading, expressing his dislike for the activity
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Dislike for English and reading, viewing them as classes of historic struggle
